---
title: "Sequence analysis"
output: html_document
---

# Created by: Cob Staines (cobstainesconsulting@gmail.com)

# config
```{r}
## Load in Libraries (install them in you need them.)
librarian::shelf(tidyverse, yaml, dbplyr, RPostgres, DBI, ribbitrrr, here, rio, janitor)

# read in config files
config_12s = read_yaml(here("16S_sequence_processing", "runs/methods_2026-03-05/12S/output/metadata/config.yml"))
config_16s = read_yaml(here("16S_sequence_processing", "runs/methods_2026-03-05/16S/output/metadata/config.yml"))



```

# load data files
```{r}
# feature tables
## 12s
feature_table_12s =
  read_tsv(here("16S_sequence_processing", paste0(config_12s$run$runDir, "/analysis/s06_denoised_", config_12s$taxonomy$gene, "_eDNA/sample_table/feature-table.tsv")), skip = 1) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rename("asv_id" = "#OTU ID") %>%
  arrange(asv_id)

feature_long_12s = feature_table_12s %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -asv_id,
               names_to = "sample_id",
               values_to = "asv_count") %>%
  filter(asv_count != 0) %>%
  arrange(sample_id) %>%
  select(sample_id,
         asv_id,
         asv_count)

asv_totals_12s = feature_long_12s %>%
  group_by(asv_id) %>%
  summarise(asv_total_count = sum(asv_count),
            sample_count = n_distinct(sample_id),
            samples = paste(sort(unique(sample_id)), collapse = ", ")) %>%
  arrange(desc(asv_total_count))

## 16S
feature_table_16s =
  read_tsv(here("16S_sequence_processing", paste0(config_16s$run$runDir, "/analysis/s06_denoised_", config_16s$taxonomy$gene, "_eDNA/sample_table/feature-table.tsv")), skip = 1) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rename("asv_id" = "#OTU ID") %>%
  arrange(asv_id)

feature_long_16s = feature_table_16s %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -asv_id,
               names_to = "sample_id",
               values_to = "asv_count") %>%
  filter(asv_count != 0) %>%
  arrange(sample_id) %>%
  select(sample_id,
         asv_id,
         asv_count)

asv_totals_16s = feature_long_16s %>%
  group_by(asv_id) %>%
  summarise(asv_total_count = sum(asv_count),
            sample_count = n_distinct(sample_id),
            samples = paste(sort(unique(sample_id)), collapse = ", ")) %>%
  arrange(desc(asv_total_count))

# sequence tables
## 12s
asv_seq_12s =
  read.fasta(here("16S_sequence_processing", paste0(config_12s$run$runDir, "/analysis/s06_denoised_", config_12s$taxonomy$gene, "_eDNA/representative_sequences/", 
                           list.files(here("16S_sequence_processing", paste0(config_12s$run$runDir, "/analysis/s06_denoised_", config_12s$taxonomy$gene, "_eDNA/representative_sequences"))), 
                           "/data/dna-sequences.fasta"))) %>%
  dplyr::rename(asv_id = seq.name) %>%
  arrange(asv_id) %>%
  mutate(bp = str_length(seq.text),
         gene = "12S")

## 16s
asv_seq_16s =
  read.fasta(here("16S_sequence_processing", paste0(config_16s$run$runDir, "/analysis/s06_denoised_", config_16s$taxonomy$gene, "_eDNA/representative_sequences/", 
                           list.files(here("16S_sequence_processing", paste0(config_16s$run$runDir, "/analysis/s06_denoised_", config_16s$taxonomy$gene, "_eDNA/representative_sequences"))), 
                           "/data/dna-sequences.fasta"))) %>%
  dplyr::rename(asv_id = seq.name) %>%
  arrange(asv_id) %>%
  mutate(bp = str_length(seq.text),
         gene = "16S")

```

# sequence lengths
```{r}
seq_all = bind_rows(asv_seq_12s,
                    asv_seq_16s)

ggplot(seq_all, aes(x = bp, fill = gene)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  facet_wrap("gene", scales = "free_x") +
  theme_minimal()
```
